PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?date WHERE {
  ?match wdt:P31 wd:Q937507 ; wdt:P3450 wd:Q120290091 ; wdt:P585 ?date .
  ?phase wdt:P2058 ?match ; rdfs:label ?phaseLabel .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?phaseLabel) , "semi final"))
  .
  FILTER(LANG(?phaseLabel) = 'en')
}
LIMIT 1
